summary: Iteration-2 LeadOrbit CRM upgrades verified end-to-end. Added /app/backend/tests/test_new_features.py with 14 pytest cases covering: WhatsApp inbound simulator + has_whatsapp flip, status-update webhook, /api/inbox/conversations WA-active filter + new fields, /api/whatsapp/send has_whatsapp flip, receiver-numbers CRUD with 409 conflict, /api/settings/receiver-routing admin-guard, IndiaMART RECEIVER_MOBILE auto-routing (suffix-match across +91/91/0), admin excluded from auto round-robin, admin manually assignable. ALL 14 NEW TESTS PASS. Frontend Playwright verified: admin /chat list shows phone under customer name, thread header has chat-status-select + chat-reassign-select (admin-only) + chat-phone-display + chat-info-toggle, lead-info-panel opens with add-note-input/add-note-btn (note 'TEST_note_212879' persisted within 5s poll), Settings → call-routing-panel shows routing-row-{username} for Priya/Ravi/Admin with Add control. Executive (ravi) /chat correctly hides reassign select, shows fewer convs (74 vs admin 144), status select still visible.

minor.issue: Iteration-1 backend_test.py::TestWhatsApp::test_whatsapp_send_stores_message and test_welcome_auto_message_on_create now fail because (a) iteration-2 added strict 24-hour customer-care window enforcement on free-text sends (correct WhatsApp policy) and (b) WHATSAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN + PHONE_NUMBER_ID env are now configured in this preview, so wa_send_template/text hits the real Meta Graph and returns 400 instead of mock 'sent_mock'. Old tests (test_welcome_auto_message_on_create asserts status='sent_mock', test_incoming_message uses non-Meta payload shape, test_whatsapp_send_stores_message sends free-text without inbound first) need to be updated for new behavior. Not iteration-2 bugs.

action_items: (Optional) Update /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py::TestWhatsApp tests to (a) simulate inbound first to open the 24h window before /whatsapp/send, (b) drop the 'sent_mock' assertion since real Meta creds are now configured in preview, and (c) replace the custom inbound webhook payload in test_incoming_message with a Meta-shaped payload (or use the new /api/webhooks/whatsapp/_debug/simulate endpoint).
(Already noted in iter1) server.py is now 2498 lines — strongly recommend splitting (auth, leads, webhooks_whatsapp, webhooks_indiamart, receiver_routing, reports). Adds maintenance + test isolation.
critical_code_review_comments: _find_user_for_receiver iterates all active users in Python instead of using a Mongo query — fine for small teams, but for >1k users add an index on receiver_numbers and query suffix directly.

auto_send_whatsapp_on_create still calls Meta even when no template approval — failing welcome messages still get persisted with status='failed', cluttering the thread. Consider only persisting on success or surfacing a system-warning row.

/api/webhooks/whatsapp/_debug/simulate uses a synthetic Request object via __get__; fragile if FastAPI ever inspects more attributes. Safer to refactor the inbound handler core into a helper called by both real and simulated flows.

_normalize_receiver_list de-dupes by last 10 digits but stores the original full normalized number — if user adds '+919999911111' then '09999911111', the second is silently dropped. UX-wise a 4xx/notice would be clearer than silent drop.

success_rate.backend: 100% on iteration-2 features (14/14 new tests pass)
success_rate.frontend: 100% on iteration-2 features (chat list phone + thread header selects + info panel + add note + call-routing panel + role-gated reassign all verified)

test_credentials: admin/Admin@123 (admin), ravi/Exec@123 and priya/Exec@123 (execs). NOTE: Ravi's password had been changed by an earlier test run; new test fixture auto-resets it via PATCH /api/users/{id} so admin password reset still works.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_RR_*, TEST_Existing, TEST_Flip, TEST_WASim, TEST_RouteByReceiver, TEST_StatusSender leads via IndiaMART webhook + WA simulator. One TEST_note_<ts> was added on a chat thread.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use /app/backend/tests/test_new_features.py as the iteration-2 regression suite (14 tests, 100% pass). It already auto-recovers Ravi's password if changed. The original /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py has 3 stale TestWhatsApp tests that fail in this preview because (a) WhatsApp creds are now real, not mock and (b) free-text sends now require an open 24h window. Those failures are NOT iteration-2 bugs. Frontend selectors confirmed: data-testid='conv-row-*', 'chat-status-select', 'chat-reassign-select' (admin-only), 'chat-phone-display', 'chat-info-toggle', 'lead-info-panel', 'add-note-input', 'add-note-btn', 'call-routing-panel', 'routing-row-{username}'. Polling is 4s — wait 5s after writes.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — all iteration-2 features (incoming WA flip + simulator + status webhook, WA-active filter + new conversation row fields, /whatsapp/send has_whatsapp flip, receiver-numbers CRUD + 409 conflict, /settings/receiver-routing, IM RECEIVER_MOBILE routing with suffix-match, RR excludes admin, admin manual-assign) are implemented and verified working.
